routes.name: Fast Transit Route
routes.description: Direct trajectory with maximum engine output. Arrive significantly sooner but at higher system stress.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Arrive ~22% sooner, securing prime landing sites and political advantage
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: Higher engine wear reduces landing margin; crew fatigue increases stress responses

routes.name: Standard Transit Route
routes.description: Optimized route with moderate engine output. Balanced risk/reward profile.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Solid compromise between speed and system preservation
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: Moon faction may gain positioning advantage

routes.name: Economical Transit Route
routes.description: Extended route with minimal engine use. Conservative resource usage and system preservation.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Maximum system integrity and fuel margin for landing operations
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: Moon faction likely to establish dominance; limited landing site selection

routes.name: Mars Moons Detour
routes.description: Extended route passing Phobos and Deimos for potential resource harvesting or intelligence gathering.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Opportunity to acquire rare minerals or intelligence on Moon faction movements
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: Significant time delay; exposure to potential interception during detour

routes.name: Solar-Storm Avoidance
routes.description: Extended route with additional shielding and course adjustments to avoid predicted solar flare activity.

tradeoffs.immediate_benefit: Crew safety and system integrity protected from solar radiation events
tradeoffs.delayed_cost: Moderate time penalty; potential for Moon faction to exploit the delay
